app/hr/jobs/[id]/page.tsx
├── Left Rail (35%)
│   └── ApplicationRow[]         ← getJobApplications
└── Right Panel (65%)
    ├── ScorecardView             ← SHARED — import from Phase 2
    ├── GapReport
    ├── InterviewQuestionsAccordion   ← lazy fetch
    ├── StageDecisionControls
    └── EscrowManagement          ← 4 states · polls every 5s when FUNDED
